Backend: AI batch scanner with OpenAI GPT-4.1 returning ranked results with AI scores, actions, conviction, and rationale
Backend: AI signal generation with expanded parameters including detailed reasoning, key theses, invalidators, and learning context

Frontend: AI Signal Generation working with HOLD signal at 53% confidence, detailed theses and reasoning

Frontend: SEBI disclaimers present on all pages
